This genus is part of the subtribe Oncidiinae, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The Oncidiinae subtribe is further divided into several tribes, with Zelenkoa onusta being one of the species within the Oncidieae tribe. Orchids within this tribe are known for their unique and colorful flowers, often with long, thin petals. The classification of Zelenkoa onusta reflects its distinct characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the orchid family.
